content.text: Let me read a few more supporting component files to give you a complete picture:

Perfect! Now let me create a comprehensive summary document for you:

## Rearden Web App - Codebase Exploration Report

### 1. Full File Tree Structure (apps/web/src/)

```
apps/web/src/
├── main.tsx                          (React entry point)
├── router.tsx                        (Route definitions)
├── components/
│   ├── Button/
│   │   ├── Button.tsx
│   │   └── Button.module.scss
│   ├── CandidateCard/
│   │   ├── CandidateCard.tsx
│   │   └── CandidateCard.module.scss
│   ├── Input/
│   │   ├── Input.tsx
│   │   └── Input.module.scss
│   ├── Layout/
│   │   ├── Layout.tsx
│   │   └── Layout.module.scss
│   ├── Logo/
│   │   ├── Logo.tsx
│   │   └── Logo.module.scss
│   ├── Navbar/
│   │   ├── Navbar.tsx
│   │   └── Navbar.module.scss
│   ├── PageTransition/
│   │   └── PageTransition.tsx
│   ├── ScoreBadge/
│   │   ├── ScoreBadge.tsx
│   │   └── ScoreBadge.module.scss
│   ├── SearchBar/
│   │   ├── SearchBar.tsx
│   │   └── SearchBar.module.scss
│   ├── Select/
│   │   ├── Select.tsx
│   │   └── Select.module.scss
│   ├── SkillTag/
│   │   ├── SkillTag.tsx
│   │   └── SkillTag.module.scss
│   ├── VideoPlayer/
│   │   ├── VideoPlayer.tsx
│   │   └── VideoPlayer.module.scss
│   └── VideoUpload/
│       ├── VideoUpload.tsx
│       └── VideoUpload.module.scss
├── contexts/
│   └── ThemeContext.tsx              (10 theme options)
├── hooks/
│   ├── useApi.ts                     (Generic API fetching)
│   ├── useSearch.ts                  (Search with debouncing)
│   └── useVideoUpload.ts
├── lib/
│   └── api.ts                        (API client)
├── pages/
│   ├── Landing/
│   │   ├── Landing.tsx
│   │   └── Landing.module.scss
│   ├── Search/
│   │   ├── Search.tsx
│   │   └── Search.module.scss
│   ├── CandidateProfile/
│   │   ├── CandidateProfile.tsx
│   │   └── CandidateProfile.module.scss
│   └── Register/
│       ├── Register.tsx
│       └── Register.module.scss
└── styles/
    ├── global.scss                   (Global resets)
    ├── _variables.scss               (SCSS variable definitions)
    ├── _tokens.scss                  (CSS custom properties for theming)
    ├── _animations.scss              (Keyframe animations)
    └── _mixins.scss                  (Reusable SCSS mixins)
```

---

### 2. Key Files - Full Contents

#### **apps/web/src/main.tsx**
Entry point that wraps app with ThemeProvider and RouterProvider.

#### **apps/web/src/styles/_variables.scss**
Contains SCSS variables for colors, spacing, radii, shadows, typography, breakpoints, and layout constants. Uses CSS custom properties from _tokens.scss.

**Key values:**
- Colors: bgDeep, bgBase, bgElevated, bgSurface, textPrimary/Secondary/Muted
- Accents: accentPurple/Light/Dark, accentTeal/Light
- Spacing: $space1 through $space20 (4px to 80px)
- Radii: $radiusSm (6px) to $radiusFull (9999px)
- Typography: $fontSize12 through $fontSize64
- Breakpoints: $bpMobile (480px), $bpTablet (768px), $bpDesktop (1024px), $bpWide (1280px)

#### **apps/web/src/styles/global.scss**
CSS resets and global styles:
- Box-sizing, font smoothing, default font family
- Removes default margins/padding from buttons, inputs
- Configures focus-visible with purple outline
- Sets body background to dark theme

#### **apps/web/src/components/Button/Button.tsx**
Flexible Button component with:
- Variants: "primary" (gradient), "secondary" (glass), "ghost" (transparent)
- Sizes: "sm" (32px), "md" (40px), "lg" (48px)
- Can render as `<button>` or `<a>` (if `href` prop provided)
- Uses Motion v12 for scale animations on hover/tap
- Disabled state support

#### **apps/web/src/components/Button/Button.module.scss**
Button styles:
- `.primary`: Gradient from accentPurple to accentPurpleLight, glow on hover
- `.secondary`: Glass morphism with accentPurple border
- `.ghost`: Transparent with subtle white hover state
- Focus ring included via mixin

#### **apps/web/src/components/CandidateCard/CandidateCard.tsx**
Displays candidate info in card format:
- Shows thumbnail image (or placeholder)
- Displays score badge if provided
- Name, title, location
- Max 4 skills displayed
- Optional match reason
- Hover animation lifts card slightly (y: -4)
- Clickable with navigation

#### **apps/web/src/components/PageTransition/PageTransition.tsx**
Wraps page content with fade-in/out animations:
- Initial: opacity 0, y: 20
- Animate: opacity 1, y: 0
- Exit: opacity 0, y: -20
- Duration: 0.3s

#### **apps/web/src/components/Layout/Layout.tsx**
Main layout wrapper:
- Fixed Navbar at top
- Main content area below navbar
- Uses AnimatePresence from Motion for page transitions
- PageTransition wrapper with location-based key for route changes

#### **apps/web/src/components/Layout/Layout.module.scss**
Simple flex layout with navbar height padding on main content.

#### **apps/web/src/components/Navbar/Navbar.tsx**
Navigation bar with:
- Logo link to home
- Nav links to Search and Register
- Active link indicator (animated underline)
- Theme selector (Select component)
- Uses NavLink with render prop pattern for active state

#### **apps/web/src/components/Navbar/Navbar.module.scss**
Fixed navbar with glass morphism effect, spring animation for active indicator.

#### **apps/web/src/pages/Landing/Landing.tsx**
Hero landing page with:
- Animated badge "The future of hiring"
- H1 with gradient text and strikethrough "resumes"
- Two CTAs: Start Searching, Join as Candidate
- Features section (3 cards): Video-First, AI-Powered, Lightning Fast
- Stats section: 500+ profiles, 85% faster, 3x match rate
- CTA section with logo and Explore button
- Extensive use of Motion staggering animations

#### **apps/web/src/pages/Search/Search.tsx**
Search results page:
- SearchBar component (with typing)
- Grid of CandidateCard components
- Shows results count
- Loading skeleton (6 cards)
- Empty state with icon if no results
- Staggered card animations
- Click card to navigate to profile

#### **apps/web/src/pages/CandidateProfile/CandidateProfile.tsx**
Individual candidate profile:
- Fetches candidate data via useApi
- Video player (with poster image)
- Name, title, location, experience, availability
- About section with bio
- Skills display
- Contact button and back button
- Availability labels mapped from enum values

#### **apps/web/src/styles/_tokens.scss**
CSS custom properties for **10 themes**:
1. **Y2K** (default): Lime green (#c8f000) + teal accents
2. **Purple Night**: Deep purple (#6c5ce7) + teal
3. **Rearden Metal**: Teal (#7ec8b8) + desaturated palette
4. **Steel Frost** (light): Teal + light backgrounds
5. **Forge**: Brown/orange (#b05a1a) + gold accents
6. **Neon Y2K**: Hot pink (#ff2d8a) + lime
7. **Daylight** (light): Orange (#ff5c1a) + teal
8. **Bliss** (light): Green (#0d7a62) + blue
9. **Aurora**: Dark blue + cyan/green
10. **Meadow** (light): Teal + green

Each theme defines: colors, glass properties, shadows with theme-specific glows.

#### **apps/web/src/styles/_animations.scss**
Keyframe animations:
- `shimmer`: Loading effect
- `pulse`: Opacity fade
- `glow`: Shadow pulsing
- `glowBorder`: Border color animation
- `spin`: Full rotation
- `gradientShift`: Background position shift

#### **apps/web/src/styles/_mixins.scss**
Reusable SCSS mixins:
- **Media queries**: @mixin mobile, tablet, tabletUp, desktop, wide
- **Glass morphism**: @mixin glass, @mixin glassHover
- **Container**: Centered max-width with responsive padding
- **Truncate**: Line clamping (1 line or multi-line)
- **Focus ring**: Purple outline
- **Custom scrollbar**: Styled webkit scrollbar

#### **apps/web/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx**
Theme management context:
- Type: `Theme` union of 10 theme values
- Provider wraps app, stores theme in localStorage
- `useTheme()` hook returns {theme, setTheme}
- Default theme: "y2k"
- Sets `data-theme` attribute on document root

#### **apps/web/src/hooks/useApi.ts**
Generic API hook:
- Takes path string
- Returns {data, loading, error, refetch}
- Fetches on mount
- Uses apiFetch under the hood

#### **apps/web/src/hooks/useSearch.ts**
Search-specific hook:
- Debounced search (400ms)
- Two API paths: `/candidates` (if empty) or `/search` (POST)
- Returns SearchResultWithCandidate[] with candidateId, score, matchReason, candidate
- Handles loading/error states

#### **apps/web/src/lib/api.ts**
Minimal API client:
- `apiFetch<T>(path, options?)` - wrapper around fetch
- Base URL: `/api`
- Sets Content-Type header
- Throws on non-ok responses

#### **apps/web/src/components/SearchBar/SearchBar.tsx**
Search input component:
- Cycling placeholders (4 options, rotates every 3s)
- Loading spinner icon
- Optional onSubmit callback
- Styled input with search icon
- Debouncing handled by parent (useSearch)

#### **apps/web/src/components/VideoPlayer/VideoPlayer.tsx**
Custom video player:
- Play button overlay
- Click toggles play
- Native controls appear when playing
- Handles onPlay, onPause, onEnded events
- Poster image support

---

### 3. Architecture Highlights

**Component Structure:**
- All components follow the pattern: Component.tsx + Component.module.scss
- SCSS Modules with camelCase class names
- Motion v12 animations for interactive elements

**Styling System:**
- CSS custom properties (tokens) for theme switching
- SCSS variables bridge to tokens
- Mixins for common patterns (glass, container, truncate, focus ring)
- 10 complete color themes with light/dark variants

**State Management:**
- Context API (ThemeContext) for theme
- React hooks (useState, useEffect, useCallback) for local state
- Custom hooks for API and search logic

**Routing:**
- React Router v6 with nested routes
- 4 main pages: Landing, Search, CandidateProfile, Register
- Layout wrapper with AnimatePresence for transitions

**API Layer:**
- Minimal fetch wrapper
- `useApi` for GET requests
- `useSearch` for search with debouncing
- Both expect `/api` base path

---

### 4. Key Dependencies Inferred
- React 19
- React Router v6
- Motion v12 (for animations)
- SCSS Modules
- @rearden/types (shared types)

---

This is a well-structured video-first hiring platform frontend with strong attention to theming, animations, and user experience patterns. The modular component design, consistent styling system, and clear separation of concerns make it maintainable and extensible.
